constitution.defining_principle: Jurisdiction enforces: Anything that enters reality must be justified, verified, and logged. Authority emerges from the disciplined ability to refuse when legitimacy is incomplete.

core_architecture.labor_layer: OBS → INS → BRF → PUB → MEM → EVO (parallel workers propose claims)
core_architecture.authority_layer: TRI Gate → Mayor → Ledger (deterministic verification, immutable recording)
core_architecture.world_mutation: Only allowed after signed receipt from Mayor exists

K0_authority_separation.invariant: Only registered attestors can sign claims
K0_authority_separation.enforcement: TRI gate checks attestor_id against registry

K2_no_self_attestation.invariant: Module cannot attest to itself; evidence must pre-exist claim
K2_no_self_attestation.enforcement: P2 gate checks explicit self-ref and ephemeral sources

K5_determinism.enforcement: All gates pure functions; P1 blocks dynamic selectors

K7_policy_pinning.invariant: Policy immutable within run; new version requires new hash
K7_policy_pinning.enforcement: TRI gate verifies claim policy_hash matches pinned hash

gate_ordering_frozen.purpose: Evidence must exist physically, hashes must match, paths must be safe
Claim policy hash must match pinned policy (immutability)
Only registered, non-revoked attestors can sign
Prevent explicit and implicit self-reference; enforce hard pre-existence
No dynamic selectors anywhere in claim; global scope

verdict_logic.DEFER: No FAIL, but WARN checks exist (incomplete evidence)

refusal_properties.sterile: Refused claims emit no artifacts, write no files
refusal_properties.canonical: Refusal messages deterministic, no timestamps/machine IDs/run IDs
refusal_properties.final: Refusal is terminal; no grace periods or fallback modes

immutability_enforcement.mutation_prevention: No code change, no convention drift, no ambient authority

versioning.next_version_requires: New constitution hash + Mayor signature + full claims process

constitution.declaration: This constitution is no longer theoretical. It has been empirically tested under adversarial pressure (50 claims, 0 escapes). Every gate has fired. Every K-invariant has been verified. The system can refuse to act when legitimacy is incomplete—and that refusal is final. Authority by refusal, enforced by construction.
